docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED COLLECTION CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CROMMIE, MAURICE F AKA MAURICE CROMMIE AKA MAURICE FELIX CROMMIE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED
APPLICATION FOR AND RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED COLLECTION CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CROMMIE, MAURICE F AKA MAURICE CROMMIE AKA MAURICE FELIX CROMMIE
NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CROMMIE, MAURICE F AKA MAURICE CROMMIE AKA MAURICE FELIX CROMMIE $30,833.20 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $30,833.20, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE OF APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT --- ORIGINAL NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED COLLECTION CORPORATION SERVED MAR-14-2002, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT CROMMIE, MAURICE F AKA MAURICE CROMMIE AKA MAURICE FELIX CROMMIE
PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION, WRIT MAY BE ISSUED ON 4/19/02, IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT.

NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION UNIVERSITY OF CAIFORNIA, DAVIS, 140 MRAK HALL U.C.CAMPUS, DAVIS CA 95616``` FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED COLLECTION CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CROMMIE, MAURICE F AKA MAURICE CROMMIE AKA MAURICE FELIX CROMMIE
